name: Advanced Hip Twists
preceding_figure_names: Alemana, Circular Hip Twists, Continuous Hip Twists, Natural Top, Rope Spinning, Three Alemanas, Three Threes
following_figure_names: Alemana, Hockey Stick, Sliding Doors, Fencing, Three Alemanas, Open Hip Twist, Curl, Three Threes, New York LSP, Spot or Switch Turn To R (Lady to L), Underarm Turn To L, Reverse Top
notes:
Alternative finishing positions:
Open Position: Man turn 3/8 to L over steps 5 and 6.
Open CPP
Contact Position: use normal hold.
Man turn 1/2 to L over steps 5 and 6 to end RF to side and slightly fwd.
Lady: 3/4 to L over steps 5 and 6 to end LF behind RF as Cuban Cross.
Man can use "Press Line" on step 1 by making a slight swivel to R on RF and placing LF fwd on ball of foot with pressure but with partial weight.
This can be danced following Alemana with R to R hand hold, changing to L to R hand hold on step 5 of this figure.

steps.action: Step forward in RSP with slight body turn to R
comments: Previous step: lead lady towards R side.
Increase tone and lower L arm to R at chest level. Widen R arm in hold to R side.

steps.action: Cuban Cross behind RF (LF behind RF) 1/8 turn to L
comments: Retain tone and return arms to normal position, slightly to R

steps.action: RF back with slight body turn to L to normal position
comments: 3: Transfer weight to LF | Body completes turn
Increase tone in L arm. Release R hand hold.

steps.action: Transfer weight to LF | Body completes turn
comments: Increase tone in L arm. Release R hand hold.

steps.action: RF to side in Fan Position 1/8 turn to L over steps 5 and 6
comments: Slightly extend L arm, L hand still.

steps.action: RF back in RSP 1/2 turn to R
comments: Turn starts end of previous beat. At previous beat: LF fwd in line with RF, R hip open up (which gives Man space), keep RF behind, keep pressure on RF more, press into it.
"3 &", on "&" start turning 1/2 to L to face Man. This is a bigger twist action. Weight onto LF, R hip lifted in the back, big preparation. Track RF when turning.

steps.action: RF fwd in line with LF towards Man's R side 5/8 turn to L
comments: Turn starts end of previous beat. RF cross LF in front.
Pressed Forward Walk. Settle L hip more. make gap between legs bigger.
"4 1 &", do not turn to R early, Hold on 1, straighten R leg with weight, then turn on "&".

steps.action: LF fwd passing in front of Man 1/4 turn to R
comments: Turn starts end of previous beat
Turn is initiated from hips. Hips turn more than body.

steps.action: RF fwd and slightly across, then turn to end RF back 1/8 to L then further 1/2 to L
steps.amount_of_turn: 1/8 to L, then a further 1/2 to L
comments: Turn starts end of previous beat

steps.action: LF back in Fan Position body completes turn
comments: Do not let body weight take over. Release L leg and step back ahead of body. Backward walk action.

Fan position is a picture pose position. Give it some "significance" with more arm styling. Start from LH in middle of torso, then elbow-wrist-hand extend out. Body turns to left in the direction of the hand, do not tilt shoulders. Look at your audience, along the L arm.
